meta_title: For Founders: idea validation to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to idea validation and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Idea Validation to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to use idea validation to overcome a lack of portfolio. A professional case study using Antigravity and Claude Code for SaaS founders.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for the perfect portfolio. Instead, use rapid idea validation to build a 'micro-MVP' that solves a single, painful problem for a specific niche. By leveraging Antigravity for architecture and Claude Code for rapid iteration, you create tangible proof of competence that converts prospects into early-paying customers immediately.
content.intro:
The blank screen syndrome is the silent killer of entrepreneurial ambition. You have the vision, but your GitHub is empty, and your lack of a track record feels like a brick wall standing between you and your first $1,000 MRR. You are trapped in the 'no portfolio, no proof' loop that keeps thousands of talented founders on the sidelines forever.

But here is the industry secret: Clients do not buy portfolios; they buy outcomes. By shifting your focus from 'building a brand' to 'validating a specific solution,' you bypass the need for a legacy resume. We are going to use high-leverage AI tooling to build a functional, revenue-ready prototype in a single weekend, effectively manufacturing authority out of thin air.

steps.title: Niche Problem Identification
steps.description: Don't build a generic SaaS. Identify a high-friction manual task in a specific vertical. We focus on 'pain-first' development to ensure your MVP has immediate market pull.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the top 5 manual workflows for independent consultants. Identify a specific, repetitive task that can be automated with a micro-SaaS. Output a problem statement, target persona, and the core value proposition.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Research the most common manual spreadsheet tasks for real estate agents and draft a 3-page PRD for a micro-SaaS solution.'

steps.title: Architecting the MVP Foundation
steps.description: Use Antigravity to scaffold a clean, production-ready architecture. We avoid bloatware and focus on a lean stack that can be deployed in hours.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a boilerplate for a Next.js 14 application with Supabase authentication, Tailwind CSS, and Stripe integration. Ensure the architecture follows clean code principles for rapid iteration.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Generate the project structure for a Next.js app with Supabase and Stripe, ensuring all environment variables are ready for deployment.'

steps.title: Rapid Logic Implementation
steps.description: Leverage Claude Code to write the core business logic. We focus on the 'Happy Path' only to get to market before the competition.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Develop the core utility function that processes user input and transforms it into the desired output based on our validated PRD. Ensure robust error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Implement the core logic for the data transformation engine. Use TypeScript and ensure it handles edge cases for empty inputs.'

steps.title: Integration and Deployment
steps.description: Connect your payment gateway and database. A product isn't validated until it can accept money.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the Stripe webhook handler to update the database status once a payment is confirmed. Secure the endpoint with standard signing secrets.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Integrate Stripe checkout session creation and the webhook handler. Test the flow end-to-end using the stripe-cli.'

steps.title: Validation Loop Launch
steps.description: Deploy to Vercel and get it in front of 10 prospects. The feedback loop is your real portfolio.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a cold outreach email template focused on the problem we just solved, designed for high conversion on LinkedIn.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Generate a list of 20 high-value leads in the target niche and draft a personalized outreach sequence for our new MVP.'

pro_tips: Never build a landing page before you have a functional core feature; validation happens via the demo, not the marketing copy.
Use 'Feature Flagging' to hide incomplete modules, allowing you to ship the core value while keeping the UI clean.
Focus on 'Time-to-Value' metrics; if your user can't experience the 'Aha!' moment in under 60 seconds, your MVP is too complex.
Treat your code comments as documentation for your future self; when you move fast, technical debt is inevitable, but clarity is optional.
Always include a 'Request a Feature' button in your MVP to gather real-time data on what your first users actually want to pay for.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, commit to a 'build in public' strategy on X or LinkedIn. Document the bugs you fixed and the feedback you received. This narrative is more powerful than any traditional portfolio.
content.conversion_block: You are only one MVP away from a portfolio that commands respect and revenue. Stop building for yourself and start building for the market. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
